top_signals.title: Memory chipmakers ride AI boom to join trillion-dollar club
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s SK Hynix and US-based Micron bring tally of companies to achieve $1tn market capitalisation to 16
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
